title: Vincetoxicum henryanum
taxonomy: Vincetoxicum henryanum belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is classified as a species of flowering plant. It is a type of milkweed vine, native to China. The genus Vincetoxicum is a group of periwinkle-like plants, and this specific species is native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. Vincetoxicum henryanum is a rare and endangered species due to its limited geographical range and habitat fragmentation. Its classification also suggests a close relationship with other species within the Asclepiadoideae subfamily.
